display.purpose: Hero headline. Once per page, max.

label.purpose: Form labels, metadata, tabs, default-size buttons.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Resting state for every Card. Four-stop micro-halo, max opacity 0.04. Always paired with a 1px border hairline.

shadows.name: deep
shadows.purpose: Hover state on hoverable Cards; resting state on modals and featured surfaces.

shadows.name: button-rest
shadows.purpose: Subtle lift on primary and danger buttons at rest (shadow-sm in Tailwind).

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus ring on interactive elements. Two-step (offset + ring) so it reads on any background.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default for state transitions on buttons, inputs, badges, tabs.

motion.name: theme-transition
motion.purpose: Background-color and color transition on body when toggling light/dark theme.

motion.name: progress-fill
motion.purpose: Width transition on JobCard progress fill so percent updates smoothly.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single-accent action button. Reserved for the primary verb on a surface; never more than one per visible region.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: var(--color-accent, #0075de); color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; border: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #0075de); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: var(--color-accent-hover, #005bab); border-color: var(--color-accent-hover, #005bab); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-background, #ffffff), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-accent, #0075de); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: The default non-accent button. Cream surface, hairline border, ink-deep text. Used for Cancel, Apply, and any non-primary verb.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background-color: var(--color-surface, #f6f5f4); color: var(--color-text-primary, rgba(0,0,0,0.95)); padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, rgba(0,0,0,0.12)); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: var(--color-surface-hover, #f1f0ed); border-color: var(--color-border-strong, rgba(0,0,0,0.2)); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-background, #ffffff), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-accent, #0075de); } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Lowest-emphasis button. Transparent at rest, fills to cream on hover. Used for inline dismiss / edit / close affordances.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background-color: transparent; color: var(--color-text-primary, rgba(0,0,0,0.95)); padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: var(--color-surface, #f6f5f4); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-background, #ffffff), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-accent, #0075de); }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action button. Coral fill, white text. Reserved for delete / reject / discard verbs.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background-color: var(--color-error, #e03e3e); color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; border: 2px solid var(--color-error, #e03e3e); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-background, #ffffff), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-error, #e03e3e); }

components.name: Card
components.description: The default container. Paper-white surface, hairline border, four-stop ambient shadow. Hover lifts to deep shadow + firm hairline when hoverable.
components.html:
Photo metadata
Aperture f/2.8 · ISO 400 · 1/250s · 85mm · Lr edits applied
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: var(--color-background, #ffffff); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, rgba(0,0,0,0.12)); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 0px 4px 18px, rgba(0,0,0,0.027) 0px 2.025px 7.84688px, rgba(0,0,0,0.02) 0px 0.8px 2.925px, rgba(0,0,0,0.01) 0px 0.175px 1.04062px; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: var(--color-border-strong, rgba(0,0,0,0.2)); box-shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.01) 0px 1px 3px, rgba(0,0,0,0.02) 0px 3px 7px, rgba(0,0,0,0.02) 0px 7px 15px, rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 0px 14px 28px, rgba(0,0,0,0.05) 0px 23px 52px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.25px; line-height: 1.27; color: var(--color-text-primary, rgba(0,0,0,0.95)); margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Inter, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.224px; line-height: 1.43; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4642); }

components.name: Image Tile
components.description: The signature photo-grid tile. Card surface with a thumbnail frame on top, filename / subtitle / metadata stack below. Top-right slot for overlay badges. Hover promotes the hairline and deepens the shadow.
components.html:
DSC_4821.NEF

Editorial · 2024 Q4

10 / 14 / 2024
components.css: .ds-tile { background-color: var(--color-background, #ffffff); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, rgba(0,0,0,0.12)); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 0 4px 18px, rgba(0,0,0,0.02) 0 0.8px 2.925px; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); width: 240px; } .ds-tile:hover { border-color: var(--color-border-strong, rgba(0,0,0,0.2)); box-shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 0 14px 28px, rgba(0,0,0,0.05) 0 23px 52px; } .ds-tile-button { display: block; width: 100%; padding: 0; margin: 0; background: none; border: none; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; } .ds-tile-button:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px var(--color-accent, #0075de); } .ds-tile-frame { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; background-color: var(--color-surface, #f6f5f4); } .ds-tile-img { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .ds-tile-overlays { position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 8px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-tile-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; background-color: var(--color-surface, #f6f5f4); color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4642); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, rgba(0,0,0,0.12)); border-radius: 9999px; backdrop-filter: blur(4px); } .ds-tile-body { padding: 8px 12px 12px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-tile-title { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-text-primary, rgba(0,0,0,0.95)); margin: 0; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-tile-subtitle { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4642); margin: 0; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-tile-meta { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: var(--color-text-tertiary, #847f7a); margin: 0; }

transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); width: 280px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-job:hover { border-color: var(--color-border-strong, rgba(0,0,0,0.2)); box-shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 0 14px 28px, rgba(0,0,0,0.05) 0 23px 52px; } .ds-job-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 8px; gap: 12px; } .ds-job-titleblock { min-width: 0; } .ds-job-type { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-text-primary, rgba(0,0,0,0.95)); margin: 0; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-job-id { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: var(--color-text-tertiary, #847f7a); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; margin: 2px 0 0; } .ds-job-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; background-color: rgba(98, 196, 152, 0.12); color: var(--color-success, #1aae39); border: 1px solid rgba(98, 196, 152, 0.30); border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-job-progress { margin-top: 8px; } .ds-job-progress-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4642); margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-job-progress-pct { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-job-progress-track { width: 100%; height: 6px; background-color: var(--color-border, rgba(0,0,0,0.12)); border-radius: 9999px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-job-progress-fill { height: 100%; background-color: var(--color-accent, #0075de); border-radius: 9999px; transition: width 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-job-time { margin-top: 12px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: var(--color-text-tertiary, #847f7a); components.name: Input
components.description: Single-line text field with a label above. Border promotes on hover, replaced by a 2px ring on focus.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: Inter, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4642); } .ds-input { background-color: var(--color-background, #ffffff); color: var(--color-text-primary, rgba(0,0,0,0.95)); font-family: Inter, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, rgba(0,0,0,0.12)); border-radius: 8px; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-text-tertiary, #847f7a); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: var(--color-border-strong, rgba(0,0,0,0.2)); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-accent, #0075de); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Badge (default)
components.description: The neutral pill badge. Cream surface, ink-mid text, hairline border. Used for counts, captions, meta tags.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid; line-height: 1.33; } .ds-badge-default { background-color: var(--color-surface, #f6f5f4); color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4642); border-color: var(--color-border, rgba(0,0,0,0.12)); }

components.name: Badge (accent)
components.description: The blue-tinted accent badge. Reserved for one-of-a-kind callouts and active filter labels.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid; line-height: 1.33; } .ds-badge-accent { background-color: var(--color-accent-light, #f2f9ff); color: var(--color-accent, #0075de); border-color: rgba(0, 117, 222, 0.20); }

components.name: Score Pill
components.description: Numeric 1–10 score with optional prefix label. Threshold band: green ≥ 7, yellow ≥ 5, red < 5. Tabular-nums on the digit so columns align.
components.html: Identity8.5 Street6 3 Best—
components.css: .ds-score { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; border-radius: 9999px; line-height: 1.33; } .ds-score-label { font-weight: 400; opacity: 0.8; } .ds-score-value { font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-score-high { background-color: rgba(26, 174, 57, 0.10); color: rgba(26, 100, 36, 1); } .ds-score-mid { background-color: rgba(221, 91, 0, 0.10); color: rgba(140, 60, 0, 1); } .ds-score-low { background-color: rgba(224, 62, 62, 0.10); color: rgba(140, 38, 38, 1); } .ds-score-empty { background-color: var(--color-surface, #f6f5f4); color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4642); }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Removable filter pill: a default badge with a ghost-button × on the trailing edge. Single-click remove, no confirm.
components.html: portrait
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 4px 2px 10px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; background-color: var(--color-surface, #f6f5f4); color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4642); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, rgba(0,0,0,0.12)); border-radius: 9999px; line-height: 1.33; } .ds-chip-label { max-width: 14rem; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip-remove { width: 20px; height: 20px; padding: 0; background: transparent; border: none; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4642); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-chip-remove:hover { color: var(--color-text-primary, rgba(0,0,0,0.95)); background-color: var(--color-surface-hover, #f1f0ed); }

components.name: Tab Nav
components.description: Horizontal text tab strip with a 1px hairline underline. Active tab gets a 3px workbench-blue bottom border and matching text color; inactive tabs sit at 60% opacity.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; gap: 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border, rgba(0,0,0,0.12)); } .ds-tab { padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-text-primary, rgba(0,0,0,0.95)); opacity: 0.6; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 3px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tab:hover { opacity: 1; border-bottom-color: var(--color-border-strong, rgba(0,0,0,0.2)); } .ds-tab-active { opacity: 1; color: var(--color-accent, #0075de); border-bottom-color: var(--color-accent, #0075de); }

components.name: Top Nav
components.description: Sticky 64px-tall top bar. Brand mark on the left (text only), pill nav links beside it, theme toggle on the far right. Active link uses a workbench-blue fill instead of an underline.
components.html:
Lightroom Tagger

Insights Images Search Identity
components.css: .ds-topnav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; background-color: var(--color-background, #ffffff); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border, rgba(0,0,0,0.12)); } .ds-topnav-inner { max-width: 80rem; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 64px; } .ds-topnav-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 32px; } .ds-brand { font-family: Inter, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-text-primary, rgba(0,0,0,0.95)); margin: 0; } .ds-topnav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-navlink { padding: 6px 12px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4642); border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-navlink:hover { background-color: var(--color-surface, #f6f5f4); color: var(--color-text-primary, rgba(0,0,0,0.95)); } .ds-navlink-active { background-color: var(--color-accent, #0075de); color: #ffffff; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); } .ds-navlink-active:hover { background-color: var(--color-accent, #0075de); color: #ffffff; } .ds-theme-toggle { width: 36px; height: 36px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: var(--color-surface, #f6f5f4); color: var(--color-text-primary, rgba(0,0,0,0.95)); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, rgba(0,0,0,0.12)); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-theme-toggle:hover { background-color: var(--color-surface-hover, #f1f0ed); border-color: var(--color-border-strong, rgba(0,0,0,0.2)); }

components.name: Page States
components.description: The three full-page states (Loading / Empty / Error) share one shape: centered text on text-center py-12, no card, no icon. Differentiation is by color and copy. Intentionally bare — should look like a polite note in the gutter, not a card.

components.css: .ds-state { text-align: center; padding: 48px 16px; } .ds-state-message { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4642); margin: 0; } .ds-state-hint { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: var(--color-text-tertiary, #847f7a); margin: 8px 0 0; } .ds-state-error { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: var(--color-error, #e03e3e); margin: 0; }

components.name: Modal
components.description: Centered dialog panel over a translucent scrim. Uses the Card vocabulary at rounded.card with shadow-deep and the firm hairline. lg padding (24px) on body. Ghost-button × close in the header. Footer actions reverse the visual hierarchy — secondary on the left, primary action on the right.

components.css: .ds-modal-scrim { position: relative; min-height: 360px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.40); padding: 24px; } .ds-modal { background-color: var(--color-background, #ffffff); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-strong, rgba(0,0,0,0.20)); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.01) 0 1px 3px, rgba(0,0,0,0.02) 0 3px 7px, rgba(0,0,0,0.02) 0 7px 15px, rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 0 14px 28px, rgba(0,0,0,0.05) 0 23px 52px; max-width: 440px; width: 100%; overflow: hidden; } .ds-modal-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 20px 24px 0; } .ds-modal-title { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.25px; color: var(--color-text-primary, rgba(0,0,0,0.95)); margin: 0; } .ds-modal-close { width: 28px; height: 28px; padding: 0; background: transparent; border: none; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4642); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-modal-close:hover { background-color: var(--color-surface, #f6f5f4); color: var(--color-text-primary, rgba(0,0,0,0.95)); } .ds-modal-body { padding: 12px 24px 0; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #4a4642); line-height: 1.5; } .ds-modal-body p { margin: 0; } .ds-modal-actions { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; padding: 24px; }  .ds-modal-actions .ds-btn-secondary, .ds-modal-actions .ds-btn-danger { font-size: 14px; padding: 8px 16px; }

narrative.overview:
This surface is the matte board around a printed photograph — warm-paper cream, deliberate restraint, a frame whose only job is to make the print readable. A photographer arrives here from Lightroom, already saturated with their own images, and the tool's job is to recede. The matte does not compete with the print.

That metaphor sets every choice. Color: warm neutrals (cream #f6f5f4, paper #ffffff, dark-mode-warm #31302e) with a single workbench blue accent that earns its rarity by appearing only on interactive elements. Borders: 1px hairlines (12% / 20% opacity) in the same key as the surface. Shadows: four-stop ambient halos that read as paper-on-paper depth, never as UI elevation. Typography: Inter at four standard weights with aggressive negative letter-spacing on display sizes — tight, modern, editorial, but unornamented.

The full dark mode is not a developer-tool dark mode. It inherits the same warm undertones and turns the room down rather than turning it cold. #31302e is a warm dark surface, not slate; #4A9EFF is the accent's softened night cousin, not a neon.

The system explicitly rejects: dark-first developer-tool aesthetics (Linear / Vercel / Supabase neon-on-charcoal), gradient-hero-metric SaaS landing pages, dense Bloomberg-terminal data grids, cards-everywhere Notion clones, and every tell of 'AI tool from 2024-2025' — gradient text, glassmorphism, neon accent on dark, animated mesh backgrounds.
keyCharacteristics: Light-first interface with full dark-mode parity in the same warm key
One blue accent, used on ≤10% of any screen, exclusively for interaction
Hairline 1px borders (12% / 20% opacity) instead of card chrome
Four-stop ambient shadows with sub-0.05 max opacity — felt, not seen
Inter 400 / 500 / 600 / 700 only, with tight negative tracking on display sizes
8px base grid; rounded.base 8px / rounded.card 12px / pill on chips
Photos are always the loudest thing on screen; UI is the matte around them

rules.name: The Matte Rule
rules.body: The UI is the matte board; the photo is the print. If a UI element has stronger visual presence than the photos it surrounds, the element is wrong. Strip the chrome before adding more accent.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Workbench Blue (accent) is the only chromatic accent in the system. It appears on ≤10% of any screen. There is no second brand color, no purple/pink/teal flourish, no decorative gradient. Adding a second hue is a regression.

rules.name: The Paper Rule
rules.body: Pure #000 and pure #fff are forbidden in dark mode. Both modes carry warm undertones; the dark surface is #31302e, not #1f2937 Tailwind slate. If an element looks blue-cool in dark mode, the token is wrong.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Every divider is 1px. Borders thicker than 1px are reserved for the active tab indicator (3px bottom-border) and primary/danger button outlines (2px, color-matched to background).

rules.name: The Negative Tracking Rule
rules.body: Display, Headline, Title, and Subtitle carry negative letter-spacing in proportion to size — never positive, never zero, never the browser default. Removing the tracking flattens the visual identity.

rules.name: The Weight Pair Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is built from weight contrast (400 ↔ 700) and size, not from color shifts. Don't lighten the ink to soften emphasis when a weight drop will do it.

rules.name: The Sub-0.05 Rule
rules.body: No shadow stop in this system has opacity above 0.05. If a shadow needs to be louder to register, the answer is to promote the border, not deepen the shadow.

rules.name: The Always-Bordered Rule
rules.body: Cards carry both a hairline border AND a soft shadow. Borderless cards drift; shadowless cards flatten. The pair is the elevation grammar.

dos: Do use the four CSS variable token families exclusively for color: --color-{background|surface|surface-hover}, --color-text-{primary|secondary|tertiary}, --color-{border|border-strong}, --color-{accent|accent-hover|accent-light} plus --color-{success|warning|error}. They flip cleanly between :root and .dark.
Do carry inline style={{ backgroundColor: 'var(--color-...)' }} on the primary button and on Card backgrounds — Tailwind class-order has bitten this codebase before.
Do lead with the lightest treatment that conveys the intent (ghost > secondary > primary). Primary buttons are scarce on this surface by design.
Do keep accent at ≤10% of any screen. If a screen feels under-accented, the answer is more whitespace, not more blue.
Do pair every card with a 1px border hairline AND shadow-card. Never one without the other.
Do preserve negative letter-spacing on Display / Headline / Title / Subtitle. The tracking is the typographic identity.
Do use Inter 400 / 500 / 600 / 700 — and only those four weights.
Do make photos the loudest thing on screen. Strip chrome around image grids; let TileGrid and the photos themselves carry the layout.
Do centralize derived UI on shared types (e.g. image.stack_* → ImageTile) so consumers stay clean.
donts: Don't introduce a second accent color. The system has one accent. Purple, teal, pink, and orange flourish-accents are forbidden — the existing palette already covers status (semantic) and emphasis (accent).
Don't use pure #000 or pure #fff outside the light-mode background token. Both modes carry warm undertones; cold neutrals break the room.
Don't raise any shadow stop above 0.05 opacity. If the elevation isn't reading, promote the border to border-strong first.
Don't apply gradient backgrounds, gradient text (background-clip: text), glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur), or animated mesh backgrounds. None of these belong here.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe accent. If a card needs emphasis, use the accent badge or a leading icon — never the side stripe.
Don't stack cards inside cards. Nested bg-bg + shadow-card reads as a UI bug.
Don't widen body line length past ~75ch. The 8-column max-w-7xl container plus generous gutters is the answer; don't fight the gutters with full-bleed text.

Don't reach for raw Tailwind palette classes (text-gray-500, bg-blue-600, text-red-600) for the four primary surface roles — backgrounds, text, borders, accents. Use the semantic token classes (bg-bg, text-text-secondary, border-border, bg-accent). The narrow exception is tinted semantic state surfaces (a green-tinted background for a success badge, a red-tinted alert panel): the project currently uses raw Tailwind for those tints by convention because the CSS variables don't yet expose tinted semantic surfaces. New semantic-state components should follow the Badge pattern — raw tint background + semantic text + semantic border — rather than going fully raw.
Don't invent a developer-tool dark mode. The dark theme is the same warm room with the lights down — not a charcoal-and-neon refactor.
Don't add a positive letter-spacing tracking step to display type. The tracking goes more negative as size goes up, never the reverse.
